title: 1.20.2 Replays
description: Allows you to join 1.20.2 servers with a 1.20.1 client and therefore with the Replay Mod!
body:
**The project has been archived since Replay Mod finally updated!**

Fed up with not being able to play on 1.20.2 with Replay Mod?
This mod pack lets you join 1.20.2 servers with 1.20.1 and the Replay Mod!
Works right out of the box, no configuring needed!

You can add your mods, but there is a decent chance something will break!

**I DO NOT OWN NOR HAVE I CREATED ANY OF THE INCLUDED MODS!** All credit goes to the creators of ReplayMod, ViaFabricPlus, and FabricAPI!
